entries.summary: Tauri Commands & Integration: encoding detection, settings/seasons DB helpers, managed club/preference/seasons/import_csv Tauri commands, dialog capability and command registration
top_rejection_reasons: SQL column/VALUES placeholder count mismatch (107 cols vs 114 placeholders)
Missing transaction rollback on error path (no ROLLBACK on Err)
lessons_learned: Use conn.transaction() for RAII rollback instead of manual BEGIN/COMMIT to avoid orphaned transactions
Always verify SQL column names count matches VALUES placeholders count — this was the most common source of bugs in the import pipeline
Make internal modules pub mod for testability from integration tests
Prefer encoding_rs::decode_to_utf8 with last=true for single-shot decoding of file-sized buffers
Deferred command registration pattern works well — define commands in their feature tasks, register all at the end
